task_completion.description: Navigate to the Question Bank for the CHEM101 course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the Moodle interface, specifically the 'Question bank' or 'Categories' page within the 'Introduction to Chemistry' (CHEM101) course.
The category list shows 'Atomic Structure' nested under the 'Default for CHEM101' category.
The category list shows 'Chemical Bonding' nested under the 'Default for CHEM101' category.

task_completion.description: Move all 'Atom_' prefixed questions to the 'Atomic Structure' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Atomic Structure' category shows a question count of 5 in the category list, OR the question bank view for this category displays the questions starting with 'Atom_'.

task_completion.description: Move all 'Bond_' prefixed questions to the 'Chemical Bonding' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Chemical Bonding' category shows a question count of 5 in the category list, OR the question bank view for this category displays the questions starting with 'Bond_'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the default category no longer contains the moved questions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Default for CHEM101' category shows a question count of 0 (or a significantly reduced number excluding the 10 moved questions), or its question list view is empty of 'Atom_' and 'Bond_' questions.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Moodle.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (like Firefox or Chromium) being used to navigate the Moodle GUI, rather than terminal curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation to move the questions.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows with SQL commands (e.g., mysql) or database management GUIs (e.g., phpMyAdmin) are visible modifying the Moodle database.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots display the authentic Moodle LMS interface with its standard navigation, menus, and styling, not a text editor or locally mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The course shortname is 'CHEM101'. The agent must create exactly two categories: 'Atomic Structure' and 'Chemical Bonding'. There are exactly 5 questions with the prefix 'Atom_' (Atom_01 to Atom_05) and 5 questions with the prefix 'Bond_' (Bond_01 to Bond_05). The VLM should verify that the 'Atomic Structure' category contains exactly 5 questions and the 'Chemical Bonding' category contains exactly 5 questions, while the 'Default for CHEM101' category no longer contains these 10 questions.
